## Description
Brief description of what this PR does (e.g. new idea doc, fix typo, update index).

## Type of change
- [ ] New idea or document
- [ ] Update to existing document
- [ ] Update README or docs index
- [ ] Fix (typo, link, consistency)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist
- [ ] New docs are in `docs/` (or `docs/recommendations/` for recommendations).
- [ ] README and/or `docs/README.md` updated if adding or renaming docs.
- [ ] Filenames and headings are clear and consistent with the rest of the repo.

## Additional notes
Any context for reviewers (e.g. "Part of idea #3", "Addresses #N").
